sections.title: Respiratory Protection Fit Test and Issuance Record Ack Log
sections.html:
Acknowledgment

This record documents the fit testing and issuance of respiratory protection equipment to employees. Proper fit testing ensures the respirator forms an effective seal, protecting the wearer from airborne hazards. Employees are required to understand the proper use, maintenance, and limitations of their assigned respiratory protection, as outlined in the MH Construction Respiratory Protection Program. This is critical for maintaining a safe working environment.

I acknowledge that I have read, understand, and agree to comply with the MH Construction Respiratory Protection Policy as required by 29 CFR 1910.134 Respiratory Protection and WAC 296-842 Respiratory Protection.

Employee Acknowledgment Signatures
